capture_overlay_recovery.boundary: source/tool route is present; semantic original capture must classify as expected route before pixel overlay parity claims

debugger_address_map_boundary.forbidden_claim: do not infer original-runtime success from static no-delta frames or Firestaff-only C080 tests
debugger_address_map_boundary.required_boundary: map original LZEXE/real-mode addresses for F0359 enqueue, F0380 dequeue, F0377 C080 handler, and F0280 candidate transition

assertions: start_south front-left is stairs entry side sample
start_south front-right is corridor side sample
turn_right_west front-right wall with door thing sample
move_forward_west moves to x=0 and sees off-map D1C as invalid wall
turn_left_east has D1C front wall blocker
blocked_forward_south preserves party state after wall collision

breakpoint_gates.blocker_if_missing: host/emulator mouse translation or active mouse-input table blocks before original queue
breakpoint_gates.expect: for screen click (111,82), P0725/P0726=111/82, L1109_i_Command=80, queue write G0432_as_CommandQueue[last]={Command:80,X:111,Y:82}

breakpoint_gates.blocker_if_missing: queued command is dropped/overwritten/timed differently before C080 dispatch
breakpoint_gates.expect: L1160_i_Command=80 and L1161/L1162=111/82 after reading G0432_as_CommandQueue[first]

breakpoint_gates.blocker_if_missing: C080 dispatch or screen-to-viewport coordinate binding differs from source-locked assumption
breakpoint_gates.expect: F0377 entered, PC viewport origin subtracted, normalized point hits C05 front-wall ornament/portrait clickable cell

breakpoint_gates.blocker_if_missing: front-wall C05 hit-state/sensor face/data blocks after F0377 but before candidate transition
breakpoint_gates.expect: front-wall C127_SENSOR_WALL_CHAMPION_PORTRAIT reaches F0280 and sets G0299_ui_CandidateChampionOrdinal

pass175_status.remaining_blocker: native gdb can open/probe only far enough to show the stock DOS DM.EXE has no ReDMCSB symbol binding; need a DOS real-mode/source-symbol bridge or address map before F0359/F0380/F0377/F0280 can be proven

redmcsb_source_audit.claim: Original new-game viewport state is decoded from DUNGEON_HEADER.InitialPartyLocation and starts on map 0.
Every relative party/viewport probe must rotate the facing direction first, then apply the original east/north vectors.
Party turn/step commands mutate state only through source movement legality and then stop the wait loop for redraw.
Capture timing must respect draw-from-current-party-state, command queue processing, and cooldown decrement cadence.
Dungeon-view cells are derived from the updated party direction/map coordinates before presentation.
Viewport draw order starts from black/ceiling/floor source bitmaps, not from a captured previous frame.
Wall/door assets share the same viewport bitmap target and must be compared as composited viewport content.
Open-cell visual evidence must preserve the original object, creature, projectile/effect deferral order.
The comparison seam is the presented 224x136 viewport zone after the viewport draw request/vblank path.
Pass175 original-runtime work must bind addresses at enqueue, dequeue, C080 dispatch, and candidate transition; visual no-delta alone is not evidence.
